title: nephrodium latebrosum
intro: Nephrodium latebrosum, also known as the Late-brooded Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium latebrosum include reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, which can be beneficial for individuals suffering from stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
